full_text:
Feng Ji (Yuantu) 逢紀 (元圖)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Feng Ji (逢紀), styledYuantu (元圖), was born in Nanyan. Vassal of Yuan Shao. Supported Yuan Shang as Shao’s successor. Feng Ji was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Yuan Shao, and Yuan Shang. Feng Ji lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
